description: Time series AutoGluon pipeline: load and split panel data, train and refit models, build leaderboard.

components.description: Load time series data from S3, cleanse, and write per-series train/test splits.

stages.description: Validate pipeline inputs and split parameters.
Read source data from S3 (truncated to size limit).
Parse timestamps, validate ids, and deduplicate panel keys.
Apply per-series temporal train/test and selection/extra splits.
Write train/validation CSVs and test artifact.

components.description: Train AutoGluon time series models, refit top N, and evaluate on holdout.

stages.description: Load train/test CSVs and build TimeSeriesDataFrames.
Run TimeSeriesPredictor fit on selection train and rank on test.
Refit each top model on selection plus extra train data.
Evaluate refit models; write metrics, back_testing.json, and notebooks.

components.description: Build the AutoML leaderboard HTML from per-model metrics.

stages.description: Aggregate model metrics, rank models, and render leaderboard HTML.
